_notes: Complex relations require legTypes (asset roles in the relation) and attributeTypes (literal facets).
legTypes reference assetTypes by key from data/asset-types.json.
attributeTypes reference attributeTypes by key from data/attribute-types.json.
Cardinality (min/max) is set per leg/attribute. min=0 means optional; min=1 means mandatory.

complexRelationTypes.name: DCAT3 Resource Relationship
complexRelationTypes.description: Reifies dcat:Relationship — attaches a Role and contextual metadata to a link between two DCAT3 Resources.

complexRelationTypes.name: DCAT3 Qualified Attribution
complexRelationTypes.description: Reifies prov:Attribution — links a Resource to an Agent with a specific Role.
